rationale: The cited paper appears mainly as a supporting reference for a methodological claim that OLS can be biased in dynamic advertising models, and once again in a grouped discussion of measurement-error work. The citing paper does not adopt the cited paper's specific estimators (DLS or MKF) as its core method, nor does it build its theory, hypotheses, or main empirical design around that prior study. Its central contribution is a synergy-focused multimedia model and normative analysis, with Kalman filtering explained via other methodological sources as well. So this citation functions as background support rather than a distinct building block.
